activities_projects.title: Generalised Number Trick
activities_projects.objective: Create a universal number trick using algebra
steps: Let the starting number be x
Ensure the final result is always a constant
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Develops ability to design algebra-based puzzles

activities_projects.title: n-Row Number Pyramid Formula
activities_projects.objective: Find the formula for the top value in an n-row pyramid

activities_projects.title: Fibonacci Pyramid Investigation
steps: Write Fibonacci numbers in the bottom row

activities_projects.title: Calendar Magic Extension
activities_projects.objective: Create a calendar trick using a different grid size
steps: Choose a 3×3 grid in a calendar
Use algebra to find a formula for the sum

activities_projects.title: Three-Digit Divisibility Trick
steps: Prove the sum is divisible by 37

activities_projects.title: Repeated Digit Number Investigation
activities_projects.objective: Understand special properties of repeating numbers
steps: Explain why the result equals the original number

activities_projects.title: Animal Legs Puzzle
steps: Let horses be x and hens be y
Write equations using heads and legs

activities_projects.title: Genie Coin Puzzle
activities_projects.objective: Work backwards to solve exponential growth puzzles
steps: Write algebraic equations for each round
Work backwards to find the starting number
